2604.19567.title: Multi-modal Reasoning with LLMs for Visual Semantic Arithmetic
2604.19567.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) as post-training is crucial for enhancing the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs) in coding and math. However, their capacity for visual semantic arithmetic, inferring relationships from images, remains underexplored. The classic text analogy "king"-"man"+"woman" = "queen" illustrates relational reasoning, yet replacing text with images of "king" and "man" significantly reduces performance because it requires commonsense knowledge and the extraction of concise concepts from irrelevant visual details. This capability is important for service and domestic robotics in unstructured environments, where robots must infer semantic relationships among objects, agents, and actions. In a kitchen, recognizing from images that "powder" and "cake" are related by "is made of" grounds symbolic relations in perception, enabling tool substitution, task generalization, and improved semantic reasoning. Prior work approaches semantic arithmetic by decoding image features after vector arithmetic, but suffers from modality gaps and lacks systematic evaluation. In this paper, we formulate two novel tasks, two-term subtraction and three-term operations, and construct the Image-Relation-Pair Dataset (IRPD) for benchmarking. We further propose Semantic Arithmetic Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (SAri-RFT), which post-trains large vision-language models (LVLMs) using a verifiable function and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on IRPD and the real-world Visual7W-Telling dataset. By equipping LVLMs with robust cross-modal relational reasoning, this work advances domestic robots' ability to ground symbolic reasoning in perception, enhancing decision-making, tool adaptability, and human-robot interaction in complex environments. Datasets and source code are provided in the supplementary material.
2604.19567.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）作為後訓練對於提升大型語言模型（LLMs）在編碼和數學推理能力至關重要。<lb/>然而，它們在視覺語義算術方面的能力，從圖像推斷關係，仍然未被充分探索。<lb/>經典的文本類比 "king"-"man"+"woman" = "queen" 展示了關係推理，然而將文本替換為 "king" 和 "man" 的圖像會顯著降低性能，因為這需要常識知識以及從不相關的視覺細節中提取簡潔概念。<lb/>這種能力對於在非結構化環境中的服務和家庭機器人來說非常重要，因為機器人必須推斷物體、代理和行動之間的語義關係。<lb/>在廚房中，從圖像中識別 "powder" 和 "cake" 之間的關係為 "is made of" 使得感知中的符號關係得以建立，從而實現工具替換、任務概括和改進的語義推理。<lb/>先前的工作通過在向量算術後解碼圖像特徵來處理語義算術，但存在模態差距且缺乏系統評估。<lb/>在本文中，我們制定了兩個新任務，兩項減法和三項運算，並構建了圖像-關係-對數據集（IRPD）以進行基準測試。<lb/>我們進一步提出了語義算術強化微調（SAri-RFT），該方法使用可驗證的函數和群體相對策略優化（GRPO）對大型視覺-語言模型（LVLMs）進行後訓練。<lb/>我們的方法在 IRPD 和現實世界的 Visual7W-Telling 數據集上達到了最先進的結果。<lb/>通過為 LVLMs 裝備強大的跨模態關係推理，本研究促進了家庭機器人在感知中建立符號推理的能力，增強了在複雜環境中的決策能力、工具適應性和人機互動。<lb/>數據集和源代碼已在補充材料中提供。
2604.19567.author: Chuou Xu et.al.
2604.19567.authors: Chuou Xu, Liya Ji, Qifeng Chen
